basic_details.job_title: GMC Piduguralla Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 33 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Government Medical College, Piduguralla (GMC Piduguralla) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website gmc.piduguralla.ap.gov.in. A total of 33 vacancies have been announced through the GMC Piduguralla Senior Resident Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 44 years of age who have a Postgraduate degree MD/MS in the concerned Speciality or DNB in Broad Specialties as per NMC regulations, and are registered with the AP Medical Council, are eligible to apply for these Senior Resident vacancies. The walk-in interview for GMC Piduguralla Senior Resident Rec

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 44 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Senior Resident (Anatomy): MD/MS/DNB in Anatomy Senior Resident (Physiology): MD/MS/DNB in Physiology Senior Resident (Biochemistry): MD/MS/DNB in Biochemistry Senior Resident (Pharmacology): MD/MS/DNB in Pharmacology Senior Resident (Pathology): MD/MS/DNB in Pathology Senior Resident (Microbiology): MD/MS/DNB in Microbiology Senior Resident (Forensic Medicine): MD/MS/DNB in Forensic Medicine Senior Resident (Community Medicine): MD/MS/DNB in Community Medicine Senior Resident (General Medicine): MD/MS/DNB in General Medicine Senior Resident (Paediatrics): MD/MS/DNB in Paediatrics Senior Resident (DVL): MD/MS/DNB in DVL Senior Resident (Psychiatry): MD/MS/DNB in Psychiatry Senior Resident (General Surgery): MD/MS/DNB in General Surgery Senior Resident (Orthopedics): MD/MS/DNB in Orthopedics Senior Resident (Ophthalmology): MD/MS/DNB in Ophthalmology Senior Resident (OBG): MD/MS/DNB in OBG Senior Resident (Anaesthesiology): MD/MS/DNB in Anaesthesiology Senior Resident (Radiodiagnosis): MD/MS/DNB in Radiodiagnosis Must be registered in the AP Medical Council. Local candidates to AP state are preferred.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at GMC Piduguralla?
faq.answer: There are a total of 33 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident positions at Government Medical College, Piduguralla.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,500/- Per Month.

faq.question: Q4. What are the essential qualifications required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree MD/MS in the concerned Speciality or DNB in Broad Specialties as per NMC regulations and be registered with the AP Medical Council.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Senior Resident posts is 44 years.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview for the Senior Resident posts is scheduled for 18th May 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and registration certificates are required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any preference for local candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, local candidates from the AP state are preferred for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on Merit and the Rule of Reservation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and more details?
faq.answer: The official notification and other relevant details can be found in the Important Links section of this article.
